data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R

project.title: Aspirin Acetylates Thioredoxin Reductase 1 (isoform 4)
project.projectDescription: Thioredoxin Reductase 1 (isoform 4) was incubated with aspirin for 1 hour at 37 C followed by SDS PAGE. Samples were picked from SDS PAGE gel, digested with trypsin, and sent for LC-MS/MS.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Thioredoxin Reductase 1 (isoform 4) was incubated with aspirin for 1 hour at 37 C followed by SDS PAGE. Samples were picked from SDS PAGE gel, digested with trypsin, and sent for LC-MS/MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Peaks Studio was used to analyse raw files to identify acetylation sites.
